text:
On Tue, Jun 24, 2008 at 07:10:25PM -0400, Matthew Donovan wrote:
> 
> >Number:         124966
> >Category:       conf
> >Synopsis:       [PATCH]: add change_scroll_region to cons25
> >Confidential:   no
> >Severity:       non-critical
> >Priority:       medium

> >Quarter:        
> >Keywords:       
> >Date-Required:
> >Class:          update
> >Submitter-Id:   current-users

> >Last-Modified:
> >Originator:     Matthew Donovan
> >Release:        FreeBSD 7.0-RELEASE-p2 i386
> >Organization:
> >Environment:
> System: FreeBSD njord.Belkin 7.0-RELEASE-p2 FreeBSD 7.0-RELEASE-p2 #2: Mon Jun 23 13:04:04 EDT 2008 root@njord.Belkin:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/DEMON i386
> 
> 
> 	
> >Description:
>  cons25 does not have change_scroll_region in it's termcap information.

This isn't termcap issue: syscons device itself does not implement scroll 
regions.
